scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @socrates/shared build && pnpm --filter @socrates/contracts build && pnpm --filter @socrates/workspace build && pnpm --filter @socrates/providers build && pnpm --filter @socrates/mcp build && pnpm --filter @socrates/core build && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @socrates/shared build && pnpm --filter @socrates/contracts build && pnpm --filter @socrates/workspace build && pnpm --filter @socrates/providers build && pnpm --filter @socrates/mcp build && pnpm --filter @socrates/core build && vitest run
